Auspicious dates

Find your most aligned dates

For weddings, business launches, property registration, travel, or any important commitment. We cross-check your personal numbers against the universal day number to find dates where the cosmic and numerological rhythms align.

How this works: Vedic numerology considers a day auspicious when the universal day number harmonises with your moolank (psychic number, from birth day) and bhagyank (destiny number). Event type also matters — different numbers rule different domains. Wedding numbers differ from business numbers.

Your top auspicious dates

—
